content:
🔹 Why This Works:
• More time for revisions.
• Students get both peer and instructor feedback.
• Keeps pacing manageable without rushing.

5️⃣ Catharsis, Reflection & Weekly Self-Expression Spaces

📜 Pet Peeve / Reflection Discussion → “Comedy & Tragedy Mask” Threads

✅ Instead of separate reflection discussions, create a dual-thread system:
1. 🎭 “The Comedy Mask” (Lighter Reflection & Humor)
• Vent about literary frustrations.
• Share funny moments from readings, class, or life.
• Post literary memes or satirical takes.
2. 🎭 “The Tragedy Mask” (Serious Reflection & Catharsis)
• Discuss intellectual struggles or personal resonance with themes.
• Share thoughts on heavier, emotional moments in literature.
• Reflect on challenging but rewarding insights.
